summary: Tested casting enhancements (message #507): 1) Mobile bottom nav Produci!/Mercato buttons with special styling, 2) Actor cards with gender, age, nationality, fame level, growth trend indicators, 3) Backend returns new fields, 4) Doubled actor proposals (16 max)
seed_data_creation: Using existing test film 'Test Casting Avanzato' (ID: 19362b56-d223-48bd-a8b1-545762dc87d6) with enhanced casting data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 79 tested casting enhancements from message #507. All features verified working: 1) Mobile bottom nav has 7 buttons (Home, Film, Produci!, Mercato, Infra, Sfide, Notifiche) with Produci! having special yellow styling (bg-yellow-500/20, text-yellow-400). 2) Top nav shows Produci! and Mercato buttons. 3) Casting actor cards display: gender icons (♀/♂), age (42a format), nationality with globe icon, fame level badges (Emergente/Sconosciuto/Famoso/Superstar) with color coding, growth trend indicator (dash for stable). 4) Backend returns 16 actor proposals (doubled from 8) with new fields: gender, age, nationality, fame_category, fame_label, growth_trend, has_worked_with_player. 5) 'Collaboratore' badge logic exists but no actors currently have has_worked_with_player=True.

casting_actor_cards.collaboratore_badge: EXISTS - no actors currently have worked with player
